sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23398" key="damnogo/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δαμνογόνη</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δαμνοδάμεια</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δαμνώ</orth>, <sense id="n23398.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">she that subdues,</tr_> epiths. of the Moon, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Hymn.Mag.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.43</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
